tools.name: plan_trip
tools.description: Primary slot-filling and planning tool. Body supports: source, destination, date, people, days, preference, optional query, and optional slot_state. If any required field is missing it returns exactly {status:"incomplete", missing_field:"<field>", slot_state:{...}}. If complete it returns {status:"complete", data:{best_option, alternatives, itinerary, insight, booking_url, ...}}.

tools.name: execute_booking
tools.description: Open RedBus booking page for confirmed trip. Body: {"source", "destination"}. Trigger only when user confirms using yes/book/proceed/confirm.

tools.name: travel_advisor
tools.description: Get LLM-grounding guidance for itinerary advice, fallback explanation, booking status, and next-step responses.

tools.name: automate_booking
tools.description: Start a booking workflow after the user confirms an itinerary.

tools.name: get_booking_workflow
tools.description: Read the current booking workflow status.

tools.name: execute_booking_workflow
tools.description: Run the current browser automation step for a booking workflow.
